title: GlobalConcept
description: A canonical glossary node. Written once, owned by one module/zone, referenced everywhere else by ID. The shared glossary is the app's connective spine.

id.description: Sequential global ID, e.g. G1. Assigned once, never reused or renumbered.

term.description: Canonical display name, e.g. 'IRR (Internal Rate of Return)'.

aliases.description: Alternative names/abbreviations used for duplicate detection and search, e.g. ['Internal Rate of Return'].

quick_definition.description: One sentence, inline-able. The hover/tap definition.

home_module.description: Module slug that owns the deep explainer, e.g. 'private-equity'.

home_zone.description: Zone (or zone node) within the home module where the deep explainer lives, e.g. 'Z5' or 'Z1.5'.

contributed_by.description: Module slug that first minted this global (usually equals home_module).

category.description: Thematic grouping within the contributing module's glossary layer, e.g. 'Returns & Performance metrics'.

appears_in.description: Zones/modules where this global is referenced (informational; the authoritative edge list is derived from node connects_to).

disambiguate_with.description: Globals this term is commonly confused with; each pair gets an explicit 'this vs. that' cross-link in the app.
